message: - You walk through the walls of your school and run into an old friend -
Hey, have you heard about the open house at the University next week?
Yeah, I saw the flyer in the counselor's office. Are you planning on going?
I'm thinking about it. My older sister said that going to open houses really helped her when she was deciding where to apply. She said it gave her a good feel of the campus life and the people.
That sounds good. It would be cool to get a real sense of what university life is like. Maybe we could even sit in on a lecture or something.
Exactly! Plus, we'll get the chance to talk to current students, faculty, and maybe even some admissions officers. It could give us a head start on our applications.
You're right, it sounds like a pretty useful experience. And we could make a day out of it, grab some lunch after. How about we go together?
Great idea! Let's make the most out of our visit.

actions.title: Visit the University
actions.description: You can now access the university campus through the map app.
